title: petunia axillaris
intro: Petunia axillaris, also known as the woodland petunia or eastern trumpet petunia, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema. The leaves and flowers of Petunia axillaris can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
